title: Generate R program to derive ADTTE (Time-to-Event Analysis)

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADTTE (Time-to-Event Analysis) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: PARAMCD, PARAM, AVAL, CNSR, ADT, TRTP, TRTPN, (3) Handle parameter definitions, censoring variable logic, time variable derivation, event date definitions, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 254 records.
